task_completion.description: Verify the proxy service is added to docker-compose.yml using the correct Nginx image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of docker-compose.yml showing a new 'proxy' service block using the image 'nginx:1.24-alpine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the raw Docker socket mount is removed from the dashboard service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of docker-compose.yml showing the 'dashboard' service volumes section. It must NOT contain '- /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock' or similar direct socket mounts.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard service is configured to connect to the Docker API via the new proxy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of docker-compose.yml showing the 'dashboard' service environment variables including 'DOCKER_HOST=tcp://proxy:2375' (or equivalent configuration pointing to the proxy).

task_completion.description: Verify the Nginx configuration restricts access to only the allowed Docker API endpoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Nginx configuration file (e.g., nginx.conf) showing location blocks that explicitly allow GET requests to '^/containers/json$' and '^/containers/[^/]+/stats$', while denying or returning an error for all other paths and HTTP methods.

task_completion.description: Verify the updated docker-compose stack is running and functional.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of terminal showing 'docker compose ps' or 'docker ps' with both the dashboard and proxy containers running, OR curl command outputs showing 200 OK for allowed endpoints and 401/403/405 for blocked endpoints.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually modified the files in the correct project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands or text editor windows (nano, vim, etc.) modifying files specifically in /home/ga/projects/monitor-stack.

integrity.description: Verify the agent restarted the Docker stack to apply the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'docker-compose up -d', 'docker compose restart', or 'docker-compose down && docker-compose up'.

integrity.description: Verify the proxy service actually mounts the real Docker socket rather than mocking responses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the proxy service definition in docker-compose.yml to ensure it mounts '/var/run/docker.sock' as a volume to proxy the actual Docker daemon.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/projects/monitor-stack. Required services in docker-compose are 'dashboard' and 'proxy'. The proxy must run on port 2375. Allowed endpoints are GET /containers/json and GET /containers/{id}/stats. Blocked endpoints include POST /containers/create, GET /secrets, and /images/json. Pass threshold is 70.
